victoria-roma-britnell-south-west-coast.summary: As Shadow Minister for Consumer Affairs, opposed Victoria's Sex Work Decriminalisation Bill 2021; moved a reasoned amendment against the bill in the Legislative Assembly (defeated 28 October 2021), arguing sex work is often 'the result of limited choice' and that the bill lacked support (drug treatment, housing, training) for people exiting the industry.

sources.title: Sex Work Decriminalisation Bill 2021 — bill passage (reasoned amendment by Ms Britnell defeated 28 October 2021)
Vic: Sex Work Bill Quietly Passes the Lower House
